query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `market_data_cache` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `locationKey` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `data` text NOT NULL,
  `cachedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `market_data_cache_locationKey_unique` (`locationKey`)
);

  `data` text NOT NULL,

  `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `market_data_cache_locationKey_unique` (`locationKey`)
);
